long though was Miguel Angie Lopez here he is putting in an initial stinging attack Quintana though was quick to respond and was soon up to his compactors back wheel and got too far behind that deer were another deer who proven to the amongst the four best climbers in this year's race Alejandro Valverde and Primos ruggish would we see the forward and ride away again and contest the win well at jersey is race leader was looking like a distinct possibility he pressed on towards the finish line as hard as he possibly could well this has been the year of the youngster in the world of cycling hasn't it this man is one of those young talents just 20 years of age tally poacher as I mentioned a winner the Tour de l'avenir last year winner of the Tour of California and Algarve earlier on this year and now a stage winner at his first ever Grand Tour seems we only a matter of time before he wins his first ever Grand Tour but for now he will take that what a brilliant win for the youngster 23 gap between the first floor at this stage of a grand tour tomorrow it's a rest day my prediction bad coffee because there in France we should resume with this stage on Tuesday an individual time trial around po where it will be pretty much rugged she takes the win I'll see you then
